evidence: Runtime demonstration during the 2026-07-07 currency audit: bash .claude/hooks/block-substrate-write.test.sh against the live guard — 10/10 cells pass. Harness header shows the guard resolving the active substrate dir from .pi-context.json contextDir (.context) at runtime, not a hardcoded name. Shipped on main via merge 643f996c (branch feat/task-094-substrate-write-deny); hook + regression harness tracked in git (.claude/hooks/block-substrate-write.sh, block-substrate-write.test.sh) with registration in tracked .claude/settings.json (c6fd8beb).

criteria_results.criterion: A direct Edit/Write/NotebookEdit targeting the active substrate's *.json or schemas/*.json is blocked at PreToolUse with stderr naming the ops-only rule; a write outside the substrate dir passes.
criteria_results.evidence: Harness cells this run: BLOCK Write .context/tasks.json, BLOCK Edit .context/schemas/tasks.schema.json, BLOCK absolute-path write into substrate, BLOCK NotebookEdit .context/foo.json, BLOCK nested objects/ write, BLOCK ..-traversal into substrate (all exit 2); PASS packages/** source edit, PASS analysis/*.md write, PASS non-.json write inside substrate dir, PASS .json write outside substrate dir (all exit 0).

criteria_results.criterion: The block reads the active substrate dir from .pi-context.json contextDir, not a hardcoded name.
criteria_results.evidence: Harness run header this run: '# active substrate dir (from .pi-context.json contextDir): .context' — resolved at runtime from the pointer file.

criteria_results.criterion: Regression cells: true-positive block on a .context/*.json edit; pass on a packages/** source edit and on an analysis/*.md write.
criteria_results.evidence: Exactly these cells are present and green in .claude/hooks/block-substrate-write.test.sh (SUMMARY: 10 passed, 0 failed, this run).
